props.text:
A showcase of the 16:9

Mock deck illustrating every template
Design · Data · Narrative

props.notes: Three parallel propositions on a light background.

props.text: A simple framework, three moving parts

text.text: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Short descriptive paragraph that sets up the column's purpose.
Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit. Another balanced block with equivalent weight to the first and third.
Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident, sunt in culpa qui officia deserunt mollit.

props.notes: Three numbered narrative points on a dark background.

props.text: First advantage framed as a headline
Supporting sentence that expands on the headline with one or two concrete details and a clear takeaway.
Second advantage with a distinct angle
Complementary evidence or a second-order consequence that builds on the first point without repeating it.
Third advantage that completes the arc
Closing observation that ties the three points together into a coherent why-now argument.

props.notes: Three stacked modules on dark background.

text.text: Brief description of the first module and the problem it solves.
Brief description of the second module and how it builds on the first.
Brief description of the third module and what it enables downstream.

props.notes: Mock table illustrating the comparison layout.

rows.text: Total addressable market across all segments
Source: mock data for template illustration.

props.notes: Three tiered options with a narrative summary below.

text.text: Entry tier for small teams evaluating the platform.
Most popular tier covering the typical mid-market deployment.
Custom scope, dedicated support, and bespoke integrations.

props.text: Tiers expand naturally as customers grow. Starter validates the value, Growth captures the core of the market, and Enterprise unlocks the largest deals through custom scoping. Every upgrade is a net-new ARR step, not a replacement.

props.notes: Two contrasting columns with a shared narrative.

props.text:
Slow, manual workflows.
Fragmented data.
High coordination cost and limited visibility across teams.

Automated flow end-to-end.
One source of truth.
Decision-ready dashboards with continuous updates.

The left column describes the prior state in neutral terms; the right column states the new state as outcomes, not features. The narrative block explains the mechanism that closes the gap and why the change is durable rather than cosmetic.
A concise quotation that speaks to the value of the solution — short enough to read at a glance, specific enough to feel real, attributed to someone credible.

props.notes: Customer logo wall with a footnote. Logos are placeholders.

props.text: Representative sample  ·  Multiple sectors  ·  No single customer concentration
A single hero statistic with the context a reader needs to interpret it correctly.

props.notes: Four KPI cards on a dark background.

props.text: Four numbers that define the business

props.notes: A sourced insight paired with a defensibility table.

props.text: An external perspective and our moat
"A representative third-party quote that supports the positioning on this slide — short, specific, and clearly attributable to a credible external source."

rows.text: Replicable in months, but real edge-case experience is hard to shortcut.
Live dataset accrues with every deployment and cannot be bought off-the-shelf.
Specialised models built on top of the dataset produce actionable outputs no generic tool matches.

props.notes: Three numbered growth levers on a light background.

props.text: Three ways we expand from here
Entering an adjacent market with a very similar regulatory profile. Localization is mostly language and data-source wiring; the core product is already aligned.
A second module that extends the same value chain and is a natural upsell from the initial deployment.
Distribution through category-adjacent consultancies and integrators who already own the customer relationship.
Built by a small, senior team
Short bio highlighting prior background and the specific expertise this person brings.
Short bio describing technical leadership and the platform work owned by this person.
Short bio describing go-to-market ownership and distinctive prior experience.
Short bio describing design leadership and the product surface this person shapes.

props.notes: Closing slide with a single call to action.
